chapter_title.ar: باب الْوَصِيِّ يُدْرِكُ أَيْتَامُهُ فَيَمْتَنِعُونَ مِنْ أَخْذِ مَالِهِمْ وَ مَنْ يُدْرِكُ وَ لَا يُؤْنَسُ مِنْهُ الرُّشْدُ وَ حَدِّ الْبُلُوغِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 39 – The executor, orphans (under his care) become adults, but they shy away from taking their wealth, and the one who is an adult does not have the understanding of the guidance, and the limit of the adulthood

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/110)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/110)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ يَثَّغِرُ الصَّبِيُّ لِسَبْعٍ وَ يُؤْمَرُ بِالصَّلَاةِ لِتِسْعٍ وَ يُفَرَّقُ بَيْنَهُمْ فِي الْمَضَاجِعِ لِعَشْرٍ وَ يَحْتَلِمُ لِأَرْبَعَ عَشْرَةَ وَ يَنْتَهِي طُولُهُ لِإِحْدَى وَ عِشْرِينَ سَنَةً وَ يَنْتَهِي عَقْلُهُ لِثَمَانٍ وَ عِشْرِينَ إِلَّا التَّجَارِبَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abu Muhammad Al Madainy, from Ali Bin Habeeb Bayaa Al Harwy, from Isa Bin Zayd,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>: ‘Amir Al Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The child (stops) teething at seven, and he is ordered with the Prayer at ten, and he should be separated with regards to his bed at ten, and he bed-wets at fourteen, and his tallness ends at twenty one, and his intellect completes at twenty eight, except for the experiences’.
en.sarwar: 8. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from abu Muhammad al-Mad’iniy from Ali ibn Habib, Bayya’ al-Harawiy who has said that ‘Isa ibn Zayd narrated to me the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin has said, ‘A child teethes at the seventh year; he must be instructed to perform Salat (prayer) at the ninth; their bed must be separated at the tenth; experiences wet-dream at the fourteenth; his growth stops at twenty-one and growth of his reasoning ability stops at twenty-nine except experience.’”
